raw_input:
[4.0/5] Nice not thick, absorbs. I’m using this XXI vitamin C cream with the firming cream.
My face feels smoother, and not breaking out using both of them.
This cream is not real thick, and absorbs well.
I use a little light make up and it goes on smooth over this, then use blush.

I like this, but not noticing a major difference.
I’m a older women. [5.0/5] Delivers Results I Rarely See w/Other Like Products While XXI Bio-Pure facial moisturizer is packed with great skin care ingredients such as jojoba, shea butter, aloe vera, sunflower seed oil and glycerin, I think its the Vitamin C that really makes this an exceptional product. At least for my skin it's exceptional.

This is a nice, lightweight moisturizer that absorbs quickly and doesn't cause skin to look/feel oily or greasy. It softens and smooths skin. Fine lines are thinned. My dry, sensitive skin looks and feels refreshed. And thanks to Vitamin C, my normally dull skin has a dewy glow. I've not found many products that are able to do this to my skin but XXI does!

I have dry , sensitive skin and have no issues with this cream

XXI works. It works VERY well and some results like soft, smooth skin occur immediately after use. Results are long lasting. XXI recommends using this in the morning and at night. I use it once a day in the morning. A very small amount is sufficient to cover my face. Because it works so well and delivers great results and only a small amount is needed per use, I do believe the price is reasonable. However, if you find this isn't right for you, XXI offers a 30 day satisfaction guarantee. I absolutely recommend XXI Bio-Pure lotion. [5.0/5] This Line Continues To Impress Me (I Have Tried Many High End Products) I have tried many high end skin products over time and I also make my own skin care which I use a lot as well. Once in a while I like to check out another line to trade off for a while. This line, Wow. I am impressed so far.

HOW THIS COMES
This comes in a box. The bottle inside is glass with a lock pump top. Turn to the side and you can pump and then turn it back and it locks.

TEXTURE OF THE LOTION
This is what I would think of as a lotion texture. Thick, but not too thick.

MY SKIN TYPE
I tend to have normal to dry skin and it has some uneven patches on it which most probably don't notice, but I do.

HOW I USE THIS
I start with the XXI cleanser which is great stuff. Then I apply a Hyaluronic Acid serum on my skin. After that, I use this Vitamin C lotion and I finish with the XXI firming lotion on top of that. I only do this 1 time at night.

RESULTS
The results of this product line have been really impressive. My face has looked younger, more glowy, and my skin looks more awake and less tired. I have been through a lot of deaths this year and my face has looked very tired. I could not believe how much this and the other two XXI products affected how I look. It was quite exciting for me right now.

THE BOTTOM LINE
My skin glows after using this. It is soft, moisturized and when combined with the other XXI cleanser and firming lotion, the results are impressive.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. I will continue to buy products from this line (well the ones I mentioned, anyway). I really have been thankful to have them right now. They have given me a boost when I really needed one. [1.0/5] Dry Left my dads feeling very dry [5.0/5] My Mature Skin Loves This One I have super dry, sensitive, mature skin and apparently it loves this lotion.

I use only 1 to 1 1/2 pumps for my entire face and neck. This lotion absorbs into my skin almost instantly.

I love that my skin is hydrated all day, even under makeup. My skin feels so soft and so smooth.

I also love how gentle this product is to my skin. I've had no redness and no irritation whatsoever.

I've used this lotion in conjunction with the XXI Daily Cleanser and also their Intensi-Fi Firming cream and my skin looks and feels fantastic.

10+ stars for this cream. I absolutely love it.

I hope this helps you. [5.0/5] The perfect daily go-to moisturizer! This moisturizer is my daily go-to regardless of whether it's a dress down weekend day or heading to work in the week. My sensitive, dry skin has been loving this moisturizer for months now and I am very happy with the results. I cleanse with the XXI daily cleanser and then follow up with the Vitamin C moisturizer as part of my routine. I will use the XXI firming cream around my eyes and neck for extra hydration and to minimize fine lines and absolutely love my glowing skin! Looking forward to trying more XXI products! [5.0/5] "Skin is Glowing" I adore this moisturizer - I use it with the Bio-Pure serum. It goes on really nicely, smells great, iand somehow is very light weight while being really moisturizing. I have started getting compliments from my friends that my skin is "glowing". I don't wear make up, the only change I've made is using XXI products (Scrub & the vitamin C serum & moisturizer). Highly recommend!! [5.0/5] LOVE IT!! If you are looking for clean products with natural ingredients that work, try this line! The vitamin C lotion Is lightweight and makes my skin feel
Smooth and bright. Don’t hesitate!! [5.0/5] Best face lotion on the market! I have so many positive things to say about this incredible lotion, but let me start with the most important- yes it’s that good and you need it in your life immediately!

I’ve been looking for the perfect face lotion since I realized my skin isn’t getting any younger and it’s time to start taking care of it. This. Is. It.

Let’s start with the weight- I don’t know how they do it but it’s the perfect amount of I know that it’s moisturizing my skin but still light weight and comfortable. No more feeling like you are wearing a mask. No more scratching your cheek and finding gunk under your nails. Just beautiful skin.

The next most important thing I consider when applying a product to my face is smell. I can’t handle any artificial scents or perfumes anywhere on my body, but especially my face (it’s so close to my nose!). This has a lovely aroma that completely disappears when I rub it in! No more wanting to wash the stinky lotion off my face, this is perfect!

Why is Vitamin C important in lotion? Well let me tell you a story. Before I bought this I went on vacation with my family. I used sunblock liberally, but after days on the beach I ended up with some color on my face- most of which was concentrated on my top lip! Wow, all these fun things that come with getting older, right? Well when my 5 year old asked me why it looked like I had a mustache I started looking into ways to fight hyperpigmentation. Vitamin C was the answer, and after using this lotion for only a few days the dark spots went away and my son stopped checking my lip to see if I needed to shave.

Next let’s talk about the bottle- first of all just the smallest amount comes out when you pump it so you don’t end up with a handful of lotion that you are trying to reverse pump back into the bottle. Just want a little lotion? One pump. Need more? Two pumps. You are in control! No waste means more value for your money. Also the bottle is made of glass and doesn’t have a cap (I always lose those things!) which makes it super sustainable. The pump locks so no mess when you need to take it with you. It’s basically the perfect bottle.

In closing, everything about this lotion is perfect, and if you have gotten this far congratulations to you! Now stop reading and add to cart, you will not regret it! [3.0/5] I love how it makes my skin look, but not how it feels This is a thick creamy lotion that moisturizes very well and had my face looking fantastic with all my dry fine lines gone. However, after waiting an hour for it to fully absorb it still felt heavy and kind of greasy on my skin. I'm super picky and need moisture but hate the feeling of stuff on my skin, I prefer lightweight formulas that fully absorb and feel like there is no residue left behind. This one is a pass for me especially at the current list price of $48. [5.0/5] Just what I need I use all of the XXI skincare items. I like them all, but this one is my favorite! It’s lightweight and makes my skin feel hydrated all day. It is smooth to apply and my skin feels soft after it absorbs, not greasy like other moisturizers I’ve used in the past. [5.0/5] Love this lotion! I’ve been loving for a Vitamin C lotion and boy did I find one! I already see a different in my skin! I’m so happy I found this product! It’s a must try! [5.0/5] Delightfully light for a moisturizer that lasts all day! I absolutely love XXI! It lasts all day without making my sensitive, oily skin breakout. I’ve been using it for the last 7 months and I am only on my second bottle! A little goes a very long way. I highly recommend it for anyone looking to brighten their complexion with a natural product without perfumes or chemicals! [5.0/5] Pure Hydration!!!! I have super sensitive skin and its extremely difficult to find product that I truly enjoy and that go well with my skin type! This lotion is absolute PERFECTION! It is fragrance free, goes on super smooth and is super hydrating!! I Highly recommend this product and all of XXI to anyone and everyone!! [5.0/5] Love this lotion I love this product line. I use them all. I have very sensitive skin that is easily irritated. I break out or get red splotches on my face. Never with this! It’s so light and my skin feels so much smoother. [5.0/5] Great moisture boost and blemish correction First - seller was so great about a package getting stolen. There was verified proof that it was delivered, but left at my front door in an urban area. Seller worked with me and replaced everything which was so nice.
As for the product, I have been loving it. Super sensitive skin and no irritation or reaction which is amazing. I have to be so careful with new products and really happy this worked out.
This has really been keeping my skin moisturized and I have noticed a really nice and bright complexion after just a short time! Much better than other vitamin c products I have used.

response:
Most reviewers are very happy with this Vitamin C moisturizer, giving it high marks for being lightweight, absorbing well, and leaving skin feeling soft, smooth, and hydrated throughout the day. Many note it works especially well for sensitive and dry skin without causing irritation, breakouts, or a greasy feeling. A common theme is that a little goes a long way, making it good value for the price. Several reviewers mention visible improvements like a brighter, glowing complexion, reduced fine lines, and more even skin tone. Many use it as part of a broader XXI skincare routine alongside the brand's cleanser and firming cream, and find the combination particularly effective.

On the downside, one reviewer found it left their skin feeling dry, and another felt it was too heavy and greasy for their preference, though they acknowledged it moisturized well. One older reviewer liked the product but did not notice a dramatic difference in her skin.

The packaging also received praise, with reviewers appreciating the glass bottle, locking pump, and the controlled amount dispensed per pump to avoid waste.

Overall, the product is well regarded by the large majority of buyers, particularly those with dry, sensitive, or mature skin looking for a clean, natural moisturizer with brightening benefits.
